content: Hey, everyone, I propose that we could translate coding guideline and other contribution docs into other languages. It could help contributors, maybe who are not so good at reading documents in English, contribute to our projects.

What guideline do you have in mind?

(Note that I'm not directly associated with the Rust for Linux project. I am just an interested party.)
Does the mainline kernel translate its contribution docs?
It may be better to wait until we are in mainline (that way it can be submitting as any other translation).
Got it. So just temporarily postpone it :)
